item.description: During a press briefing, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt echoed a social media post from President Trump that said any nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia would be contingent on them joining the Abraham Accords. NBC News' Monica Alba reports from the White House on the potential deal and the White House's approach.

media:content.media:title: White House says Saudi Arabia nuclear deal contingent on joining Abraham Accords
media:content.media:description: During a press briefing, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt echoed a social media post from President Trump that said any nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia would be contingent on them joining the Abraham Accords. NBC News' Monica Alba reports from the White House on the potential deal and the White House's approach.

item.title: White House says Saudi Arabia nuclear deal contingent on joining Abraham Accords

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
Frank Thorp V
item.description: The House approved a nonbinding proposal to end the Iran war, directing President Donald Trump to remove armed forces from hostilities.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump salutes as members of a U.S. Army carry team move the flag-draped transfer case
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday salutes the flag-draped transfer case holding the remains of Army Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, who was killed in the war with Iran.

item.title: House votes to end Iran war, but Senate Republicans vote to let Trump continue waging it

item.description: An investigation is underway after a police officer in Madison, Wisconsin, fatally shot a man who investigators say pulled a knife during a scuffle with deputies. Police say it took place after the man fled from officers who were responding to a report of an individual allegedly stealing bicycles and checking car doors. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports for TODAY. Warning: Video of the incident is disturbing.

media:content.media:title: Protests Erupt After Fatal Police Shooting of Man in Wisconsin
media:content.media:description: An investigation is underway after a police officer in Madison, Wisconsin, fatally shot a man who investigators say pulled a knife during a scuffle with deputies. Police say it took place after the man fled from officers who were responding to a report of an individual allegedly stealing bicycles and checking car doors. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports for TODAY. Warning: Video of the incident is disturbing.

item.title: Protests Erupt After Fatal Police Shooting of Man in Wisconsin

item.dc:creator: Kelly O'Donnell
Megan Brand
item.description: A member of JD Vance’s protective detail has been removed pending an investigation into allegations of compromising the vice president’s security, a Secret Service spokesman said Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Vice President JD Vance in the Oval Office
media:content.media:description: The Secret Service has removed a member of Vice President JD Vance's security detail amid an investigation into an allegation related to the compromise of operational and informational security, the agency announced.

item.title: Member of Vance’s Secret Service detail removed amid probe into alleged compromise of security info

item.dc:creator: Megan Brand
item.description: The report from the Partnership for Public Service tracked 27 administration officials who left their roles without including U.S. marshals, attorneys or ambassadors.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Meets With His Cabinet At The White House
media:content.media:description: New analysis from the Partnership for Public Service found that 27 Senate-confirmed officials have left their positions since the start of President Donald Trump's second term.

media:content.media:text: Former Rep. Billy Long, R-Mo., President Donald Trump's nominee to be Internal Revenue Service Commissioner, speaks during a Senate nomination hearing on May 20, 2025.
media:content.media:description: New analysis from the Partnership for Public Service found that 27 Senate-confirmed officials have left their positions since the start of President Donald Trump's second term.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Signs Executive Order Reclassifying Marijuana As Low Risk Drug
media:content.media:description: New analysis from the Partnership for Public Service found that 27 Senate-confirmed officials have left their positions since the start of President Donald Trump's second term.

item.title: Departures of Senate-confirmed Trump officials are surpassing his first term, new report finds

item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha is pushing toward Texas after crashing ashore in Louisiana. The Gulf Coast was hammered with heavy rain, high winds and floods. Meanwhile, some areas are set to face triple digit temperatures through the weekend. NBC’s George Solis reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the latest forecast.

media:content.media:title: Tropical Storm Bertha Pushes West After Battering Louisiana
media:content.media:description: Tropical Storm Bertha is pushing toward Texas after crashing ashore in Louisiana. The Gulf Coast was hammered with heavy rain, high winds and floods. Meanwhile, some areas are set to face triple digit temperatures through the weekend. NBC’s George Solis reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the latest forecast.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha Pushes West After Battering Louisiana

item.description: Video shows one orca holding a sunfish by the fin and another torpedoing toward it, blowing it into pieces in the Gulf of California.

media:content.media:title: Video shows an orca torpedoing toward a sunfish, blowing it into pieces
media:content.media:description: Video shows one orca holding a sunfish by the fin and another torpedoing toward it, blowing it into pieces in the Gulf of California.

item.title: Video shows an orca torpedoing toward a sunfish, blowing it into pieces

item.description: Peptides are often being promoted by wellness influencers and podcasters as treatments for everything from injuries and aging and now an FDA panel is meeting to discuss whether to loosen restrictions and make them easier to get. But critics say there's not enough data on safety and efficacy. NBC’s medical contributor Natalie Azar joins TODAY to break down the seven peptides being discussed and how effective they are.

media:content.media:title: FDA Advisory Committee to Review Peptide Restrictions Underway
media:content.media:description: Peptides are often being promoted by wellness influencers and podcasters as treatments for everything from injuries and aging and now an FDA panel is meeting to discuss whether to loosen restrictions and make them easier to get. But critics say there's not enough data on safety and efficacy. NBC’s medical contributor Natalie Azar joins TODAY to break down the seven peptides being discussed and how effective they are.

item.title: FDA Advisory Committee to Review Peptide Restrictions Underway

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Chuck
item.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

media:content.media:text: Woman in a blue patient uniform gown sits alone on a bed in a private room and looking out the window in hospital, expressing her concern about the results of an examination. Sad patient and thinking stress anxiety with symptoms of depression and sadness,

item.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you

item.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

media:content.media:title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
media:content.media:description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

item.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The U.S. Trade Rep announced a wave of tariffs on 60 countries in order to replace President Donald Trump’s temporary 10% tariff, which expires at midnight.

media:content.media:text: Operations At The Port of Mobile Ahead Of The BLS Import Price Index Release
media:content.media:description: Containers at APM Terminals at the Port of Mobile in Mobile, Ala., on July 8.

item.title: U.S. sets tariffs at 10% to 12.5% on 60 countries to replace expiring tariffs

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
Marlene Lenthang
item.description: With protests and demands for accountability growing louder in Madison, Wisconsin, the man who was fatally shot by a police officer this week has been identified.

media:content.media:text: A picture of Corey Ruiz is on the ground surrounded by posters and flowers
media:content.media:description: A memorial for Corey Ruiz in Madison, Wis., on Thursday, at the intersection of Williamson and South Baldwin Streets.

media:content.media:text: Candles, flowers, and a cardboard sign saying "justice for Corey Ruiz" are seen on a street. Written in walk chalk next to the poster reads "Killed at..."
media:content.media:description: A memorial for Corey Ruiz in Madison, Wis., on Thursday, at the intersection of Williamson and South Baldwin Streets.

item.title: As tensions rise in Madison after deadly police shooting, victim is identified

item.dc:creator: Adam Reiss
Alexandra Marquez
item.description: A judge repeatedly questioned why prosecutors had issued the subpoenas before pursuing alternative investigative steps.

media:content.media:text: Front of the The New York Times building in New York City.
media:content.media:description: The Justice Department subpoenaed four New York Times reporters after they reported on security concerns with the new Air Force One.

item.title: Justice Department agrees to withdraw subpoenas of New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting

item.dc:creator: The Politics Desk
item.description: In today’s edition, we examine how the escalating Iran war is playing out in the oil markets and the halls of the Capitol. Plus, Scott Wong and Matt Dixon have a profile of the little-known new senator from South Carolina.

media:content.media:text: Senator Thom Tillis, a Republican from North Carolina, during a Senate Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs Committee confirmation hearing in Washington, DC.
media:content.media:description: Sen Thom Tillis, R-N.C.

item.title: Oil prices surge as Congress splits on Iran war votes: From the Politics Desk

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
Kyle Stewart
Frank Thorp V
item.description: The House approved a nonbinding proposal to end the Iran war, directing President Donald Trump to remove armed forces from hostilities.

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump salutes as members of a U.S. Army carry team move the flag-draped transfer case
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday salutes the flag-draped transfer case holding the remains of Army Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, who was killed in the war with Iran.

item.title: House votes to end Iran war, but Senate Republicans vote to let Trump continue waging it

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Lindsay Good
item.description: Chadwick Boseman’s brothers filed a petition last week seeking control of the “Black Panther” star’s estate, accusing their brother’s widow of mismanagement and failing to distribute the assets.

media:content.media:text: Taylor Simone Ledward and Chadwick Boseman in 2019.
media:content.media:description: Taylor Simone Ledward and Chadwick Boseman in 2019.

item.title: Chadwick Boseman’s brothers seek to remove his widow from control of late actor’s estate

item.dc:creator: Sophie Ziedalski
item.description: More than 380,000 fruit pouches are being recalled nationwide over concerns they may contain soft strands of plastic in the purée.

media:content.media:text: A Pumpkin Tree Peter Rabbit Organics Banana & Strawberry 4 oz. pouch on a light yellow background
media:content.media:description: A Pumpkin Tree Peter Rabbit Organics Banana & Strawberry 4 oz. pouch.

item.title: PT Organics fruit pouches recalled over possible soft strands of plastic in purée

item.dc:creator: Kelly O'Donnell
Megan Brand
item.description: A member of JD Vance’s protective detail has been removed pending an investigation into allegations of compromising the vice president’s security, a Secret Service spokesman said Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Vice President JD Vance in the Oval Office
media:content.media:description: The Secret Service has removed a member of Vice President JD Vance's security detail amid an investigation into an allegation related to the compromise of operational and informational security, the agency announced.

item.title: Member of Vance’s Secret Service detail removed amid probe into alleged compromise of security info

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Rebecca Cohen
item.description: The former head of school at a Massachusetts boarding and day school has been indicted in connection with sexual abuse allegations against a teacher.

media:content.media:text: Miss Hall's School in Pittsfield, Mass.
media:content.media:description: Miss Hall's School in Pittsfield, Mass.

item.title: Former head of Miss Hall’s School indicted in connection with sex abuse allegations

item.dc:creator: Henry Austin
item.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday that a nuclear deal between the United States and Saudi Arabia requires the kingdom to normalize relations with Israel — a significant condition not previously mentioned as the deal was announced.

media:content.media:text: President Donald Trump responds to a question where Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman of Saudi Arabia was asked about the death of Saudi journalist Jamal Ahmad Hamza Khashoggi in the Oval Office on Nov. 18, 2025.
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump responds to a question where Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman of Saudi Arabia was asked about the death of Saudi journalist Jamal Ahmad Hamza Khashoggi in the Oval Office on Nov. 18, 2025.

media:content.media:text: From left, Mohammed bin Salman sits next to Donald Trump in the oval Office
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump meets with Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman in the Oval Office in 2025.

item.title: Trump says Saudi Arabia must normalize Israel ties before nuclear deal is approved

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
Cory Fernandez
item.description: We found the best dorm essentials to get this year, including bedding, organizers, decor, tech, supplies and much more.

media:content.media:text: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.

media:content.media:text: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.
media:content.media:description: You can get some of the best dorm essentials at great prices from Amazon, Target, Walmart and more.

item.title: The 33 best dorm essentials to make the school year go smoothly — at least as your room is concerned

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Deodorant concealer can temporarily hide dark underarms, but dermatologists warn that it may irritate skin or mask deeper issues. Here’s what to know before you try it.

media:content.media:text: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.
media:content.media:description: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.

media:content.media:text: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.
media:content.media:description: A few brands have released tinted deodorant aka deodorant concealer to help even out the skin tone in your armpits.

item.title: What is deodorant concealer and is the viral product safe? Derms weigh in

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Walmart has the Dyson V8 Absolute Cordless Vacuum marked down to just under $300 — a rare discount on a Dyson vacuum. Here’s why shoppers love it.

media:content.media:text: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.
media:content.media:description: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.

media:content.media:text: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.
media:content.media:description: The Dyson V8 Absolute is cordless, tackles pet hair and is lightweight.

item.title: This popular Dyson vacuum is $290 off at Walmart right now — get it before the price goes back up

item.dc:creator: Ashley Morris

media:content.media:text: The Macy’s Black Friday in July Sale runs through July 24 and includes deals across categories.
